items.title: Dev Dummy Overview
items.description: Reference integration for Health Assistant that exercises every Integrations SDK capability — pull, push, webhook with HMAC, two-way API, chat tools, notifications, clinical events, examinations, catalog and HITL proposals, and documents.

items.title: Capability Reference
items.description: Catalogue of every SDK hook Dev Dummy demonstrates, with the config-flow toggle that enables it and the file location to read.

items.title: Testing Scenarios
items.description: How to trigger every Dev Dummy capability — error simulation toggles, the HMAC-signed webhook contract, the two-way API routes, and the unit-test coverage map.

items.title: Troubleshooting
items.description: Diagnose missing fake biomarker data, verify Celery sync tasks, and trigger manual integration syncs via the REST API.
